response.step_by_step_log: The video consists of a dialogue session between characters from 00:00 to 01:37, followed by a song performance starting at 01:38. The song was identified as 'GimmeГ—Gimme' by Hachioji-P & Giga, performed by Inugami Korone. The lyrics were retrieved by searching '"GimmeГ—Gimme" Hachioji-P Giga Japanese and English lyrics'.
response.global_summary: The video features a dialogue between Houshou Marine and an Inugami Korone puppet, followed by a musical performance of "GimmeГ—Gimme" by Inugami Korone.

Called from you, now
